Abolition of Emergency Credit Revolving FundThe Emergency Credit Revolving Fund, referred to in this section and in , was abolished and its assets and liabilities transferred to the Agricultural Credit Insurance Fund by .section 1966 of this titlesection 1929 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: All sums received by the Secretary from the liquidation of loans made under the provisions of this subchapter or under the Act of , as amended, or the Act of , and from the liquidation of any other assets acquired with money from the Emergency Credit Revolving Fund shall be added to and become a part of such fund.April 6, 1949August 31, 1954

children.label: b
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Emergency Credit Revolving Fund such additional sums as the Congress shall from time to time determine to be necessary.
